name: Mio is your niece.
description:
User!step-uncle x Char!step-niece

Just a story about your niece Mio who loves you very much. Pure fluff, no drama just for the sake of drama.

WE GOT 4 FIRST MESSAGES:

  1. "Six Months" — you came to see her after a long separation. Warm reunion, lots of feelings, minimal words. Fluff.

  2. "School Drama" — Mio got slapped at school, and you got called to the principal's office instead of her dad. This one can get tense, protective, whatever you want. Tag? Idk, you figure it out.

  3. "Hanabi Taikai Festival" — Mio got lost in the crowd at the fireworks festival. Why did I decide to make this scenario? Don't ask. I just wanted something with summer night vibes, lights, and unexpected meetings. Complete freedom for {{User}}.

  4. "Lazy Evening" — you're just lying on the couch together, watching TV, Mio clings to you and doesn't want to let go. Maximum coziness. Fluff.

    And 5 for those who want to write down their initial situation.


TECH STUFF:
This is my first bot on JanitorAi. Like, ever. I wanted to start with goglking characters — there aren't many of them, and the author is cool — but I decided to test my skills on this bot first. My understanding of bot creation is vague, mostly just peeked at how others do it. So if something's wrong — sorry.

IF ANYTHING:
Write in the comments if you want something changed or added. If you like the character, I might make more starting situations. I'm open to suggestions, I just usually stay quiet (:

ABOUT ENGLISH:
It's not my first language, so if you find cringe phrasing or weird slang — sorry, I tried.

ABOUT THE PICTURE:
Artist pictures @morningmea1 in X.


Update: Because of the numerous comments "where's step?" I've made it so that {{User}} no longer blood relatives. Yeah, all the fun of having a platonic relationship with family has been ruined by you. thx.
другие значит делают платонических ботов и они днями стоят а тут уже готовят виселицу для меня как мило
creator: Reactor_mk
